## Properties

| Property | Attribute | Description                                              | Type             | Default          |
| -------- | --------- | -------------------------------------------------------- | ---------------- | ---------------- |
| `color`  | `color`   | The color of the icon. Defaults to 'currentColor'.       | `string`         | `'currentColor'` |
